report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#525-529), newsletter v58, and Discord announcement covering extreme fear divergence, 740-page milestone, tax season, Binance stock perps, and April catalyst calendar. Created 3 social card SVGs. Analytics: DCA calculator, fear/greed tool, and tax guides are highest-value pages during F&G=9 extreme fear + tax season overlap.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #525 (thread): Good Friday extreme fear + $316B stablecoin dry powder divergence — links to DCA calculator
Tweet #526: 740 pages milestone announcement — platform overview with category breakdown
Tweet #527 (thread): Tax season crypto checklist — April 15 deadline, taxable events, strategies — links to /taxes
Tweet #528: Binance stock perpetuals launch (Micron, SanDisk) — TradFi meets crypto exchanges
Tweet #529 (thread): April catalyst calendar — Binance perps, tax deadline, CLARITY Act, FOMC, $600M token unlocks
Newsletter v58: 'Good Friday at Extreme Fear — $316B Stablecoin Dry Powder Says Buy' — full weekly digest with market pulse, 740-page milestone, tax prep, April catalysts
Discord/Telegram announcement: Weekly Update v58 with market data, milestone, and April calendar

sections.title: Content Strategy Recommendations
items: P0: Deploy to make 533+ invisible pages searchable during peak fear-driven demand window
P1: Promote DCA calculator and fear/greed tool — search intent for crisis/accumulation content peaks during F&G sub-10
P2: Push tax content hard — 11 days to US deadline, seasonal search spike in progress
P3: April catalyst content (CLARITY Act Apr 16, FOMC Apr 28-29) should drive engagement through month
P4: Token unlock content ($600M in ARB/APT/OP/SUI/LINK) is timely and reusable weekly
